content.query:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.dim_merchant_enriched
(
    mcc VARCHAR(20),
    merchant_id VARCHAR(100),
    merchant_city VARCHAR(100),
    merchant_state VARCHAR(100),
    zip VARCHAR(20),
    mcc_description VARCHAR(255)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'dim_merchant_enriched',
    DATA_SOURCE = MyDataLake,
    FILE_FORMAT = DeltaFormat
);

select * from dim_merchant_enriched
